$description: BIM SPATIAL token category — anchored to IFC 4.3 IfcSpatialElement entity hierarchy. Site / Building / Storey / Space taxonomy.

$value.description: The geographic site or land parcel containing one or more buildings. Authoritative spatial root.

site.$description: IFC Site — geographic land parcel; authoritative spatial root.

$value.description: A whole building. Composed within an IfcSite. May contain one or more IfcBuildingStorey.
A floor or level within a building. The default expansion target for SpatialTree per BB.4 — every AEC practitioner navigates at storey level first.
A bounded volume within a storey. Rooms, corridors, voids, exclusion zones (the City-Code-as-Composable-Geometry channel for jurisdictional fragments).
IFC 4.3 introduced facilities for non-building infrastructure — bridges, roads, rail, ports, waterways. Track but treat as out-of-scope at v0.0.1; v0.0.2+ as infrastructure expands.
